TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == "katalawan ku liwliw ni Cyang-ni" "kamu nu Ing, Turks & Caicos", 2014 a mihcaan Ing-kow a tilibi igang, i Ing-kow palihalayay "cyun-cin-cu, M15" malahekal nu cenceay pasubana'ay tu kawaaw, taw-yen ci Ta-wi¬∑Hay-al "Cyang-ni¬∑we-li-ke tuluay a nilaculay nu sakatusa a iga, nipagitian a hekal i La-tin-mey-cow a S-ke-kay-ke a subalan. "Śľ∑ŚįľšĻčŚćĪś©üŚõõšľŹ"(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Turks & Caicos),2014 ,MI5) . nilaculan Ing-kow palihalayay "Ing, "Security Service" zumangngn "cin-cin-cu" "kamu nu Ing, Military Intelligence, Section 5, misaadidi' tu sulit, M15", nu Ing-kow a kanatal lihalay sakaput, i lyen-he-ko supay wi-yen-huy "u Ing-kow tapang a pikawawan, mikuwanay tu kawaw nu sebu" mikeliday tu mikawaway, tungusay mikuwan tu makakadumay a kanatal supay wi-yen-huy, caay kutunggusay nu Ing-kow mikuwanay tu kawaw, situngus mituktukay nu sicumiay a kawaw, sibalucuay palaliyas tu kawaw nu hitay, katalawan ku nizateng atu kawaw nu supay, sakay zumaay a kanatal sakalihalay a kawa u cin-cin-cu ku situngusay. Ing-kow palihalayay mala palalihalayay kaput nu kanatal, nayi' tu ku sikeynliay mizakep tademaw, sakasa amikawaw makakadum tu taylin. La-tin-mey-cow, ngangan La-mey, u tungusa Mey-cow, u malikecuay pasu tu La-tin a kumu nu binacadan nu kanatal a kamu nu Mey-cow kanatal atu kitizaan, u kaahebal pasu Amilikaz satimulan a hamin nu Mey-cow kanatal atu kitizaan. La-tin-mey-cow a lala' izaw macapi tu 13% a 19,197,000 pinbang-kung-li ku hekal a lala'. katuku i 2013 a mihcaan La-tin-mey-cow a tademaw piasip macaliway tu 6 a walwalen. I 2014 a mihcaan, La-tin-mey-cow izaw ku 5.573 memang walwalen Amilika a kalisiw pulung ku nisanga'an nu binawlan, anu ipicakay amisausi tu aca u 7.532 mang walwalen Amilika a kalisiw. cacay a cudad saayaway i 1861 a mihcaan cacay a cudad "La-tin binacadan a pikinsa" misaicelang patahkal i zyasi ku La-tin. S-ke-kay-ke saupu a subalŚúüŚÖčŚáĪŚŹĮÁĺ§Ś≥∂ S-ke-kay-ke saupu a subal "kamu nu Ing Turks and Caicos Islands,/'t…úňźks/ŚíĆ/'ke…™k…ôs/ / /'ke…™ko äs/ / /'ke…™k…ís/" Layal a ngangan Te-kay, tini i Cowng-mey-cow-pa-ha-ma-cin-taw wali timul likutay a lala' nu Ing-kow, tunvgus satip nu In-tu-cin-taw lanuay nu Lu-ka-ya-cin-taw. u s-ke-cin-taw atu Kay-ke-cin-taw 30 kayadah kasakaput nu sunal, zuma 8 ku subal izawtu ku manalelay nu tademaw, u hekay 430 pin-hwan g-kung-li, Ow-cow-kadum a kanakal nisulitan 417 pin-hwang-kung-li "161 pin-hwang-kung-li. ŚúüŚÖčŚáĪŚŹĮÁĺ§Ś≥∂(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Turks and Caicos Islands,/'t…úňźks/ŚíĆ/'ke…™k…ôs/ / /'ke…™ko äs/ / /'ke…™k…ís/)), ) likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ tiniay a Yincumin u makayniay i I-s-pa-ni-aw-la subal a Tay-now binacadan. Si-pang-ya a tademaw i 1512 a mihcaan micumud mjueneng tu kasaupu a subal satu miala tu subalay a Tay-now malakuli. namakay 17 a se-ci, kasasubalay a tademaw maseleptu. 16 katukjuh 18 se-ci Si-pang-ya, Hwa-kow atu Ing-kow dadudu sa micalap tuyni a kasaupu a subal, malingatu patzeng mueneng. katukuh 1783 a mihcaan , izikuz nu kalepacaw teked sa i Amilika, Ing-kow a tademaw malimad tu kasaupu a subal, malingatu paluma tu kupa, nika caay kapakutay nu misacikahay.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == "katar~…ĺawan ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw ni ¶jaŇč-ni" "kamu nu iŇč, turks & ¶ai ¶os", **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč-kow a tir~…ĺibi igaŇč, i iŇč-kow par~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj " ¶jun- ¶in- ¶u, m**" mar~…ĺańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ¶…ôn ¶…ôaj pasubana Ē~ °aj tu kawaaw, taw-j…ôn ¶i ta-wi*ńßaj-ar~…ĺ " ¶jaŇč-ni*w…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô tur~…ĺuaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺaj nu sakatusa a iga, nipagitian a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ i r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow a s-k…ô-kaj-k…ô a subar~…ĺan. "*******"(**:turks & ¶ai ¶os),**** ,mi*) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan iŇč-kow par~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj "iŇč, "s…ô ¶uritj s…ôr*i ¶…ô" zumaŇčŇčn " ¶in- ¶in- ¶u" "kamu nu iŇč, mir~…ĺitarj int…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺig…ôn ¶…ô, s…ô ¶tion *, misaadidi Ē~ ° tu sur~…ĺit, m**", nu iŇč-kow a kanatar~…ĺ r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sakaput, i r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ô-ko supaj wi-j…ôn-ńßuj "u iŇč-kow tapaŇč a pikawawan, mikuwanaj tu kawaw nu s…ôbu" mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu mikawawaj, tuŇčusaj mikuwan tu makakadumaj a kanatar~…ĺ supaj wi-j…ôn-ńßuj, ¶aaj kutuŇčgusaj nu iŇč-kow mikuwanaj tu kawaw, situŇčus mituktukaj nu si ¶umiaj a kawaw, sibar~…ĺu ¶uaj par~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu kawaw nu ńßitaj, katar~…ĺawan ku nizat…ôŇč atu kawaw nu supaj, sakaj zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a kawa u ¶in- ¶in- ¶u ku situŇčusaj. iŇč-kow par~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj mar~…ĺa par~…ĺar~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj kaput nu kanatar~…ĺ, naji Ē~ ° tu ku sik…ônr~…ĺiaj mizak…ôp tad…ômaw, sakasa amikawaw makakadum tu tajr~…ĺin. r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow, ŇčaŇčan r~…ĺa-m…ô, u tuŇčusa m…ô- ¶ow, u mar~…ĺik…ô ¶uaj pasu tu r~…ĺa-tin a kumu nu bina ¶adan nu kanatar~…ĺ a kamu nu m…ô- ¶ow kanatar~…ĺ atu kitizaan, u kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ pasu amir~…ĺikaz satimur~…ĺan a ńßamin nu m…ô- ¶ow kanatar~…ĺ atu kitizaan. r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° izaw ma ¶api tu **% a **,***,*** pinbaŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. katuku i **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow a tad…ômaw piasip ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu * a war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn. i **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow izaw ku *.*** m…ômaŇč war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw pur~…ĺuŇč ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu binawr~…ĺan, anu ipi ¶akaj amisausi tu a ¶a u *.*** maŇč war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw. ¶a ¶aj a ¶udad saajawaj i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a ¶udad "r~…ĺa-tin bina ¶adan a pikinsa" misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč patańßkar~…ĺ i zjasi ku r~…ĺa-tin. s-k…ô-kaj-k…ô saupu a subar~…ĺ****** s-k…ô-kaj-k…ô saupu a subar~…ĺ "kamu nu iŇč turks and ¶ai ¶os isr~…ĺands,/ Ē~ °t**ks/*/ Ē~ °k…ô*k…ôs/ / / Ē~ °k…ô*ko*s/ / / Ē~ °k…ô*k*s/" r~…ĺajar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan t…ô-kaj, tini i ¶owŇč-m…ô- ¶ow-pa-ńßa-ma- ¶in-taw war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ r~…ĺikutaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu iŇč-kow, tun*gus satip nu in-tu- ¶in-taw r~…ĺanuaj nu r~…ĺu-ka-ja- ¶in-taw. u s-k…ô- ¶in-taw atu kaj-k…ô- ¶in-taw ** kajadańß kasakaput nu sunar~…ĺ, zuma * ku subar~…ĺ izawtu ku manar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺaj nu tad…ômaw, u ńß…ôkaj *** pin-ńßwan g-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, ow- ¶ow-kadum a kanakar~…ĺ nisur~…ĺitan *** pin-ńßwaŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi "*** pin-ńßwaŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi. ******(**:turks and ¶ai ¶os isr~…ĺands,/ Ē~ °t**ks/*/ Ē~ °k…ô*k…ôs/ / / Ē~ °k…ô*ko*s/ / / Ē~ °k…ô*k*s/)), ) r~…ĺikisi ** tiniaj a jin ¶umin u makajniaj i i-s-pa-ni-aw-r~…ĺa subar~…ĺ a taj-now bina ¶adan. si-paŇč-ja a tad…ômaw i **** a mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud mju…ôn…ôŇč tu kasaupu a subar~…ĺ satu miar~…ĺa tu subar~…ĺaj a taj-now mar~…ĺakur~…ĺi. namakaj ** a s…ô- ¶i, kasasubar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôptu. ** katukjuńß ** s…ô- ¶i si-paŇč-ja, ńßwa-kow atu iŇč-kow dadudu sa mi ¶ar~…ĺap tujni a kasaupu a subar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺiŇčatu patz…ôŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan , izikuz nu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw t…ôk…ôd sa i amir~…ĺika, iŇč-kow a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺimad tu kasaupu a subar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺuma tu kupa, nika ¶aaj kapakutaj nu misa ¶ikańßaj.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == "katalawan ku liwliw ni Cyang-ni" "kamu nu Ing, Turks & Caicos", 2014 a mihcaan Ing-kow a tilibi igang, i Ing-kow palihalayay "cyun-cin-cu, M15" malahekal nu cenceay pasubana'ay tu kawaaw, taw-yen ci Ta-wi¬∑Hay-al "Cyang-ni¬∑we-li-ke tuluay a nilaculay nu sakatusa a iga, nipagitian a hekal i La-tin-mey-cow a S-ke-kay-ke a subalan. "Śľ∑ŚįľšĻčŚćĪś©üŚõõšľŹ"(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Turks & Caicos),2014 ,MI5) . nilaculan Ing-kow palihalayay "Ing, "Security Service" zumangngn "cin-cin-cu" "kamu nu Ing, Military Intelligence, Section 5, misaadidi' tu sulit, M15", nu Ing-kow a kanatal lihalay sakaput, i lyen-he-ko supay wi-yen-huy "u Ing-kow tapang a pikawawan, mikuwanay tu kawaw nu sebu" mikeliday tu mikawaway, tungusay mikuwan tu makakadumay a kanatal supay wi-yen-huy, caay kutunggusay nu Ing-kow mikuwanay tu kawaw, situngus mituktukay nu sicumiay a kawaw, sibalucuay palaliyas tu kawaw nu hitay, katalawan ku nizateng atu kawaw nu supay, sakay zumaay a kanatal sakalihalay a kawa u cin-cin-cu ku situngusay. Ing-kow palihalayay mala palalihalayay kaput nu kanatal, nayi' tu ku sikeynliay mizakep tademaw, sakasa amikawaw makakadum tu taylin. La-tin-mey-cow, ngangan La-mey, u tungusa Mey-cow, u malikecuay pasu tu La-tin a kumu nu binacadan nu kanatal a kamu nu Mey-cow kanatal atu kitizaan, u kaahebal pasu Amilikaz satimulan a hamin nu Mey-cow kanatal atu kitizaan. La-tin-mey-cow a lala' izaw macapi tu 13% a 19,197,000 pinbang-kung-li ku hekal a lala'. katuku i 2013 a mihcaan La-tin-mey-cow a tademaw piasip macaliway tu 6 a walwalen. I 2014 a mihcaan, La-tin-mey-cow izaw ku 5.573 memang walwalen Amilika a kalisiw pulung ku nisanga'an nu binawlan, anu ipicakay amisausi tu aca u 7.532 mang walwalen Amilika a kalisiw. cacay a cudad saayaway i 1861 a mihcaan cacay a cudad "La-tin binacadan a pikinsa" misaicelang patahkal i zyasi ku La-tin. S-ke-kay-ke saupu a subalŚúüŚÖčŚáĪŚŹĮÁĺ§Ś≥∂ S-ke-kay-ke saupu a subal "kamu nu Ing Turks and Caicos Islands,/'t…úňźks/ŚíĆ/'ke…™k…ôs/ / /'ke…™ko äs/ / /'ke…™k…ís/" Layal a ngangan Te-kay, tini i Cowng-mey-cow-pa-ha-ma-cin-taw wali timul likutay a lala' nu Ing-kow, tunvgus satip nu In-tu-cin-taw lanuay nu Lu-ka-ya-cin-taw. u s-ke-cin-taw atu Kay-ke-cin-taw 30 kayadah kasakaput nu sunal, zuma 8 ku subal izawtu ku manalelay nu tademaw, u hekay 430 pin-hwan g-kung-li, Ow-cow-kadum a kanakal nisulitan 417 pin-hwang-kung-li "161 pin-hwang-kung-li. ŚúüŚÖčŚáĪŚŹĮÁĺ§Ś≥∂(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Turks and Caicos Islands,/'t…úňźks/ŚíĆ/'ke…™k…ôs/ / /'ke…™ko äs/ / /'ke…™k…ís/)), ) likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ tiniay a Yincumin u makayniay i I-s-pa-ni-aw-la subal a Tay-now binacadan. Si-pang-ya a tademaw i 1512 a mihcaan micumud mjueneng tu kasaupu a subal satu miala tu subalay a Tay-now malakuli. namakay 17 a se-ci, kasasubalay a tademaw maseleptu. 16 katukjuh 18 se-ci Si-pang-ya, Hwa-kow atu Ing-kow dadudu sa micalap tuyni a kasaupu a subal, malingatu patzeng mueneng. katukuh 1783 a mihcaan , izikuz nu kalepacaw teked sa i Amilika, Ing-kow a tademaw malimad tu kasaupu a subal, malingatu paluma tu kupa, nika caay kapakutay nu misacikahay.

mu…ôn…ôŇč. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan , izikuz nu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw t…ôk…ôd sa i amir~…ĺika, iŇč-kow a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺimad tu kasaupu a subar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺuma tu kupa, nika ¶aaj kapakutaj nu
